===================================================================
--- 
+++ 
@@ -0,0 +1,39 @@
+use common.nu
+use utils.nu
+
+export def --env --wrapped git-worktree-add [
+  worktree: string
+  ...rest
+] {
+  let default_branch = git-default-branch
+  let current_branch = git-current-branch
+  let relative_path = $env.PWD | path relative-to (git-branch-root)
+  if $default_branch != $current_branch and (agree $'Not on default branch `($default_branch)`, switch now?') {
+    cd (git-worktree-path $default_branch)
+  }
+
+  let worktree_path = git-worktree-path $worktree
+  ^git worktree add $in ...$rest | complete | print $in.stdout
+  enter $worktree_path
+}
+
+export def --env git-worktree-remove [
+  worktree: string
+  --force
+] {
+  if (git-current-branch) == $worktree {
+    enter (git-default-branch)
+  }
+
+  ^git worktree remove $worktree ...$rest | complete | print $in.stdout
+}
+
+export def --env --wrapped git-worktree-use [
+  worktree: string
+  ...rest
+] {
+}
+
+export def git-worktree-list [] {
+
+}

+export def --env --wrapped git-worktree-add [

+  ...rest

+  let default_branch = git-default-branch
+  let current_branch = git-current-branch
+  let relative_path = $env.PWD | path relative-to (git-branch-root)
+  if $default_branch != $current_branch and (agree $'Not on default branch `($default_branch)`, switch now?') {
+    cd (git-worktree-path $default_branch)
+  }
+
+  let worktree_path = git-worktree-path $worktree
+  ^git worktree add $in ...$rest | complete | print $in.stdout
+  enter $worktree_path
+}
+
+export def --env git-worktree-remove [
+  worktree: string
+  --force (-f) = false
+] {
+  if (git-current-branch) == $worktree {
+    enter (git-default-branch)
+  }
+  if 
+
+  ^git worktree remove $worktree ...$rest | complete | print $in.stdout
+}
+

+

Index: 
===================================================================
--- 
+++ 
@@ -0,0 +1,70 @@
+use common.nu
+use utils.nu
+
+# Creates a new worktree from the current branch
+# and will automatically move into the new worktree
+@category git
+export def --env --wrapped git-worktree-add [
+  worktree: string         # The name of the new worktree
+  --keep-path (-p) = false # Whether to keep the current relative path when entering the new worktree
+  ...rest                  # Optional arguments to pass along to the git worktree add command
+]: nothing -> nothing {
+  let default_branch = git-default-branch
+  let current_branch = git-current-branch
+  let relative_path = $env.PWD | path relative-to (git-branch-root)
+  if $default_branch != $current_branch and (agree $'Not on default branch `($default_branch)`, switch now?') {
+    cd (git-worktree-path $default_branch)
+  }
+
+  git-worktree-path $worktree
+
+  ^git worktree add $in ...$rest | complete | print $in.stdout
+  enter $worktree_path
+}
+
+# Removes a worktree and will automatically move into the default branch
+@category git
+export def --env git-worktree-remove [
+  worktree: string
+  --force (-f) = false
+] {
+  if (git-current-branch) == $worktree {
+    enter (git-default-branch)
+  }
+
+  if $force { '-f '}
+    | ^git worktree remove $worktree $in | complete | print $in.stdout
+}
+
+export def --env --wrapped git-worktree-use [
+  worktree: string
+  ...rest
+] {
+}
+
+export def git-worktree-list [] {
+  ^git worktree list --porcelain
+  | lines
+  | compact --empty
+  | chunks 3
+  | each {
+      $in
+      | split row ' '
+      | {
+          $in.0: ($in.1 | str replace -r r#'.*/(.*)'# '$1')
+          path: $in.1
+          $in.2: $in.3
+          $in.4: $in.5
+      }
+    }
+  | move branch --after worktree
+  | insert default false
+  | update default {|row| $row.worktree == (git-default-branch) }
+  | sort-by -c {|a,b|
+      if $b.default {
+        false
+      } else {
+        $a.default or ($a.worktree < $b.worktree)
+      }
+    }
+}
